coverage.criterion: User can create named plan with scenario adjustments (e.g. +300 €/month leasing)
coverage.notes: Migration 004 plans/adjustments schema (T-0037); plan CRUD + adjustment repository (T-0038); overlay engine projects deltas on forecast baseline (T-0039); PlanService orchestration + recompute (T-0041); REST create/adjustment endpoints (T-0043); Scenarios tab adjustment CRUD + template apply (T-0044); integration tests create plan → apply template → recompute (T-0047)

coverage.criterion: Built-in scenario templates: current (Ist), leasing, savings mode, house purchase
coverage.notes: Built-in template defaults and apply_template logic (T-0040); apply-template endpoint + savings-mode suggestions (T-0043); template cards + savings mode modal (T-0044); operator guide covers all templates (T-0048)

coverage.criterion: Plan versions (v1, v2, v3) can be created and compared side-by-side
coverage.notes: Version CRUD with cap enforcement and freeze semantics (T-0038); create_version copies adjustments and freezes prior (T-0040); compare_versions metrics (T-0041); versions/compare REST endpoints (T-0043); Compare tab metrics table + grouped bar chart (T-0045); versioning unit tests including v4 cap rejection (T-0047)

coverage.criterion: Daily plan-vs-Ist comparison shows planned, actual, and deviation amounts
coverage.notes: plan_daily_cashflow hypertable (T-0037); overlay + project emit planned_net series (T-0039); plan_vs_actual with planned/actual/deviation and stale flags (T-0041); post-forecast active plan refresh keeps series current (T-0042); GET /plans/active/plan-vs-actual endpoint (T-0043); Plan vs Actual dual-line chart + daily table (T-0045); deviation sign and stale metadata tests (T-0047)

coverage.criterion: Grafana Dashboard 3 (Budget plan/ist/deviation) reflects active plan
coverage.notes: Plan-vs-actual and active plan data exposed via API (T-0043); budgets.json uid budgets with plan/Ist/Abweichung panels + MTD table + empty-state annotation (T-0046); operator guide documents Dashboard 3 and active-plan requirement (T-0048)

coverage.criterion: Scenario changes do not modify Firefly transaction data
coverage.notes: Overlay reads forecast baseline read-only; no Firefly mirror mutation (T-0039); forecast hook refreshes plan only, no sync mutex phase change (T-0042); REST handlers read-only toward Firefly per DEC-0004 (T-0043); read-only audit assertion in plan module tests (T-0047); user guide documents read-only guarantee (T-0048)

summary.tasks_without_acceptance_ref_note: All tasks T-0037–T-0048 map to at least one AC in tasks.md acceptance refs and coverage map
